error_signature: Code node set to run once is running on each
title: Code Node executing multiple times due to loop configuration
symptom: The Code node, intended to run once, is executing for each item due to incorrect node connections. This leads to unexpected item counts in the output.
applies_when: Using a Code node set to run once
Connected to a Loop Over Items node
not_this_if: Code node is correctly connected to the done output of the loop
root_cause: The Code node is incorrectly placed within the loop path of the Loop Over Items node, causing it to execute for each item instead of just once. Proper configuration requires connecting it to the done output to ensure it runs only after all items have been processed.
fix_steps: Locate the Loop Over Items node
Disconnect the Code node from the loop path
Connect the Code node to the done output of the Loop Over Items node
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Reconfigure the Code node to connect to the done output of the Loop Over Items node.
